_note: Two real convergence points that connect ancient islands into the main tree. (1) INDIA<->SELEUCIDS via MARRIAGE: Seleucus I made a marriage-alliance (epigamia, Appian/Strabo) with Chandragupta Maurya c.303 BC. Shown honestly: Chandragupta married a daughter of Seleucus I (a documented marriage joining the houses — she connects the Maurya dynasty to the tree), but NO issue of that marriage is recorded, so the Maurya bloodline runs through his Indian queen Durdhara. The Mauryas are the HISTORICAL Indian dynasty, distinct from the legendary Puranic island. (2) ELAM->PERSIA at ANSHAN: the Achaemenids (already in the tree) rose from Elam's royal city of Anshan and took the Elamite title 'King of Anshan'; Teispes allied with Elam. Connected as a flagged DYNASTIC convergence (throne/territory, a debated Elamite-Persian fusion), NOT a documented bloodline. Sorts after 07z + the antiquity files so Seleucus/Apama/Achaemenes/EL_IDATTU all exist.
